items.name_cn:
MCM Liz Visetos
Medium Double-Sided Shopping Bag Tote 👜
Exclusive®️ Classic Black
Two classic looks are fused into one daily essential. This medium-sized Liz shopping bag is made of Visetos and Nappa leather, and can be used on both sides, with the turned-out lining revealing the Cubic classic pattern. Additionally, the lightweight silhouette can be expanded or contracted via a leather drawstring. The included detachable zippered clutch enriches the functionality of this shopping bag and can be removed to serve as a wallet for short trips.
Size: 36*17*28cm
Handle Drop: 24cm
Features: Double-sided / Two-in-one
Color: Elegant Black / Black ◼️

items.name_en: MCM New Soft Berlin Visetos Shoulder Bag, embodying the concept of combining elegance with portability, this bag is meticulously crafted as a miniaturized version of a classic suitcase. Nappa leather details and the edge-painted corners outlining the classic Visetos silhouette highlight the brand's craftsmanship. A double-zipper closure ensures the safety of small daily essentials inside the luxurious fabric lining. You can carry this exquisite bag by the soft leather handle or use the leather shoulder strap for hands-free functionality. Dimensions: 14-21-8, Style No.: 65014

MCM Stark Visetos
Bebe Boo Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac

Show off your new style with this extra-mini Stark backpack.

Size: 21*10*17.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Mini Rivet Backpack
dp Exclusive®️ Classic Cognac
Officially called mini# This classic Stark backpack features the iconic Visetos pattern and Nappa leather, a pioneer in the daily luxury field. Multi-faceted rivets outline the silhouette of the bag, embodying MCM's unique rebellious spirit. The bag features an outer pocket, a front zip pocket, and an internal compartment for tablets and small electronics, showcasing modern functionality that complements its contemporary look.

Size: 26*10.5*21.5cm
Color: Cognac/Brown

items.name_cn:
Medium Chain Bag
🔗Millie Visetos Crossbody Bag, MCM's long history is revealed through every feature of the Millie series 😇 Made of lightweight Visetos material and trimmed with Nappa leather, it is a classic modern on-the-go bag. It combines dynamic portability with classic elegance with a removable crossbody strap and laurel lock. Small approx: 18.5x11.5x4cm Medium approx: 23.5x13.5x5cm Removable crossbody strap with chain and leather decoration, Laurel lock closure, External back slit pocket, Internal open pocket and zip pocket, Internal card slot, Leather trim, Metal-tone hardware, Fabric lining
